name: Ecopetrol S.A.
description: Ecopetrol S.A. is the largest company in Colombia and one of the major integrated energy conglomerates in the Americas. The company operates across the entire hydrocarbon value chain, including exploration, production, transportation, refining, and marketing of oil, natural gas, and petrochemicals. Additionally, Ecopetrol has expanded into linear infrastructure, electricity transmission, and road concessions through its acquisition of ISA, while actively pursuing energy transition initiatives, decarbonization, and renewable energy projects.
